overview: Performance Hormone Health is a concierge-style hormone replacement therapy clinic in Winston-Salem, NC, offering personalized HRT/TRT plans based on advanced lab work. Patients receive direct provider access through text, call, or video with no waiting rooms or rushed appointments.
highlights: Direct provider access via text, call, or video
Personalized treatment plans based on advanced labs
targetAudience: Men and women in the Winston-Salem area seeking personalized hormone optimization for energy, strength, and sexual function.
